description: Stage artifact contract exists under .agent/stages/mvp.

make init and make dev prove live local PostgreSQL startup and idempotent bootstrap.

apps/api has a minimal runnable Spring Boot/Maven baseline.

Invite issuance service generates Wave 1-capable code batches without raw-code persistence.

description: Invite activation binds exactly one opaque non-PII subject and handles duplicate paths safely.
steps: Prove same-subject idempotency and double-activation prevention
